description: If comfort's on your mind, these fabulous sandals from red tape transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish and super comfy, this pair is ruggedly crafted for casual wear. Team it with jeans or shorts and step out in style.UpperLeather upper for rugged feel and styleOver-the-foot vertical and horizontal straps for added comfortBack strap to hold the foot firmly in placeContrast thread detailing for added structure and styleBrand tab appliqué d on the frontWell cushioned footbed for all-day comfortFabric and suede lining for soft touch and protection from blistersOutsoleTPU outsole provides durable traction on a variety of surfacesBranched lugs for maximum traction and ease of movementSandal careUse a leather brush to remove dirtUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
